Frequently Asked Questions

Is SignatureMakr really free?

Yes — completely free, forever. No subscription, no watermark, no hidden fees. Type your name, choose a style, and download.

Can I use my signature on legal documents?

SignatureMakr creates decorative/stylistic signatures for personal use, social media, emails, and creative projects. For legally binding e-signatures on contracts, use a dedicated e-sign service.

What formats can I download?

PNG (high-resolution, 3× retina-ready) and SVG (vector, infinitely scalable). PNG works great for emails and documents; SVG is perfect for designers.

Does my name get stored or shared?

No. Everything happens in your browser. We never send your name to a server, store it, or share it with anyone.

Can I change the color of my signature?

Yes — choose from 10 curated colors including midnight navy, royal blue, violet, rose, forest green, and more.
